title: QuestCreate VR
description: QuestCreate VR brings Minecraft: Create to life in full Virtual Reality on various Devices including the Meta Quest.
body:
# QuestCreate VR – A Steampunk VR Adventure  
*Standalone VR • External Server Mode • Universal Client Support • Shader Support (PC Version)*

**QuestCreate VR** combines Create-style steampunk automation, exploration, farming, and world-building into a highly optimized, smooth VR experience — originally designed for standalone Quest headsets, but fully playable on virtually any device.

Play however you want:
- **standalone on the Quest**,  
- **with a lightweight external server for huge worlds**,  
- **or as a normal modpack on PC / Laptop / Android (PojavLauncher).**

---

# ⚙️ Automation & Technology  
At the core of QuestCreate VR is **Create** — mechanical conveyors, gears, shafts, flywheels, contraptions and kinetic systems with real physics.

Key technology mods:
- **Create**
- **Steam ’n' Rails** – locomotives, rail networks, monorails  
- **Slice & Dice** – advanced farming & kitchen automation  
- **CC: Tweaked** – programmable Lua computers & turtles  
- **Polymorph** – clean recipe conflict resolver  

Design large factories, transport systems, and automation loops that remain intuitive and performant in VR.

---

# 🗺️ Exploration & Adventure  
A richer overworld with structures and loot — optimized so standalone VR clients don’t choke on worldgen.

- **Explorify** – camps, ruins, small dungeons  
- **Artifacts** – rare items found in structures  
- **Waystones** – fast travel  
- **Nature’s Compass** – locate biomes  
- **Trinkets** – extra equipment slots  
- **Charm of Undying** – Totem gets its own slot  

Explore, gear up, grab artifacts, and expand your steampunk base.

---

# 🌱 Farming & Food  
Built around **Farmer’s Delight** for deep cooking and agricultural progression.

- new crops (cabbage, rice, tomatoes, etc.)  
- full farm → processing → cooking automation via Create & Slice & Dice  
- **Crops Love Rain** – faster growth  
- **Smarter Farmers** – villagers replant mod crops  
- **Animal Feeding Trough** – automated breeding  
- **Right Click Harvest** – simple QoL farming  

A natural and immersive survival loop that feels great in VR.

---

# 🏡 Building & Decoration  
A huge palette to build beautiful bases and steampunk towns.

- **Beautify** – high-quality decorative blocks  
- **Handcrafted** – furniture & interiors  
- **Rechiseled** – hundreds of block variants  
- **Rechiseled: Create** – Create-themed decorations  
- **Diagonal Fences**, **Double Doors**, more building QoL  

From cozy cottages to massive factories — everything is possible.

---

# 🛠️ Performance & VR Experience  
QuestCreate VR is tuned for stable framerates and low input latency.

Performance stack:
- **Sodium**
- **Indium**
- **FerriteCore**
- **Lithium**
- **LazyDFU**
- **Debugify**
- **Memory Leak Fix**

QoL & immersion:
- **Jade** – HUD block/entity info  
- **Carry On** – move containers & blocks  
- **Dynamic Lights** – perfect for torches in VR  
- **Eating Animations**  
- **FallingTree** – full-tree chopping  
- XP orb merging, trash cans, linked doors, and more  

---

# 🔧 Play Anywhere – Cross-Platform Support  
QuestCreate VR runs on almost every platform — and behaves much like a modern Bedrock-style architecture:

- the **client stays extremely lightweight**,  
- the **server can run anywhere** (PC, laptop, tablet, phone),  
- all platforms connect seamlessly to the same world,  
- and heavy world generation is offloaded automatically.

This makes the pack far more flexible than typical Java modpacks:
**VR on Quest • Java performance on PC • mobile support via Pojav • shared servers across all devices.**

---

## **1. Quest Standalone (VR Mode)**
A lightweight, VR-optimized client with minimal overhead and smooth performance.

- local worlds supported  
- perfect for small to medium Create builds  
- fully immersive controls  

---

## **2. External Server Mode (Recommended for large worlds)**  
Run the world on any device:

- laptops  
- PCs  
- mini-PCs  
- tablets  
- Android phones  
- handhelds (Retroid, Odin, etc.)

The Quest (or any other client) connects and handles only rendering.

This unlocks:
- richer world generation  
- bigger structures  
- smoother performance  
- zero chunk-generation lag  

Perfect for complex factories and exploration-heavy worlds.

---

## 🏗️ Server Expansion – Enhanced World Generation & Structures

When running QuestCreate VR with an external server, the world becomes far richer and more complex.  
The server can handle heavy worldgen and structure mods that are intentionally *not* included in the Quest client.

### **Major Structure & Worldgen Enhancements**
- **Terralith** – large-scale biomes and terrain overhaul  
- **When Dungeons Arise + Seven Seas** – massive multi-level dungeons  
- **Dungeons & Taverns** – handcrafted locations across the world  
- **Structory** – natural, lore-friendly building generation  
- **Moog’s Voyager Structures** – exploration-focused structures  
- **Moog’s Structure Lib** – engine for advanced world generation  
- **Explorify (Server Variant)** – enhanced ruins and points of interest  
- **ChoiceTheorem’s Overhauled Village (CTOV)** – improved village layouts  
- **Lithostitched** – biome stitching and blending for seamless terrain  

### **YUNG’s Complete Structure Suite**
- **Better Dungeons**  
- **Better Mineshafts**  
- **Better Strongholds**  
- **Better Nether Fortresses**  
- **Better Ocean Monuments**  
- **Better End Island**  
- **Better Witch Huts**  
- **Bridges**  
- **Better Jungle Temples**  
- **Better Desert Temples**

These mods bring:
- deeper exploration  
- more detailed terrain  
- vast structures and ruins  
- significantly more variety and replayability  

### **Why these are Server-only**
Heavy worldgen calculations strain standalone VR devices.  
By offloading them to a server (even a tiny laptop or Android phone), the Quest client remains smooth while still experiencing full world depth.

The Quest client gets all structures, dungeons, and biomes — **but without freezing or lag**, because all generation is handled externally.

---

## **3. Universal Client Mode (PC / Laptop / Android / PojavLauncher)**
QuestCreate VR also runs as a normal modpack **without VR**:

- Windows  
- Linux  
- macOS  
- Android via PojavLauncher  

All modes are compatible with the same servers and the same worlds.

---

# 🎯 Summary  
QuestCreate VR delivers:

- Create-based steampunk automation  
- deep farming & cooking  
- world exploration & artifacts  
- rich building & decoration  
- VR-optimized performance  
- cross-platform support  
- optional server-offloading for massive worlds  

Whether you explore ancient ruins, automate entire landscapes, or build detailed steampunk factories — QuestCreate VR scales from standalone VR to large multi-device setups.

**Play big worlds on small hardware.  
Play anywhere.  
Fully immersive. Fully compatible.**
